Hero.subtitle: I'm Rahmat, a Full Stack Engineer specialized in architecting robust backend infrastructures with Golang & Laravel and creating modern, data-driven interfaces with React & Next.js.
Hero.quote: "Keep it clean, keep it scalable. Code is communication."

Experience.title: Work Experience
Experience.job1_desc1: Maintained and enhanced a digital logistics aggregator platform by implementing new features and system improvements.
Experience.job1_desc2: Designed and integrated multiple shipping APIs in PHP, increasing logistics service coverage.
Experience.job1_desc3: Conducted performance tuning and bug fixes to support high-volume transaction data reliability.
Experience.job2_desc1: Architected a modular Golang REST API (Gin/GORM) with layered architecture for high scalability.
Experience.job2_desc2: Developed a cross-platform Academic System (React + Capacitor) integrating real-time university data.
Experience.job2_desc3: Built an MBKM management app using Laravel 11 with Spatie roles and complex media handling.
Experience.job3_desc1: Delivered a retail supply chain application for distribution of agricultural equipment.
Experience.job3_desc2: Implemented FIFO inventory management and stock replenishment recommendations.
Experience.job3_desc3: Optimized database interactions using GORM and ensured secure authentication with JWT.
Experience.job4_desc1: Refactored legacy code from PHP 5.6 to PHP 8.1 (Laravel 10).
Experience.job4_desc2: Created API models, controllers, and CRUD operations for users, transactions, and products.
Experience.job4_desc3: Collaborated in Agile/Scrum technical meetings and validated APIs using Postman.

Stats.title: Coding Data & Insights
Stats.description: Real-world metrics synced from my development workflow. A live representation of consistency, skill distribution, and impact.
Stats.focus: Focusing heavily on Golang Native and Clean Architecture in 2025.

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.p1_desc: Complete organization platform for pharmaceuticals students, built using Supabase, Vercel CI/CD, and advanced RLS roles & permissions. Minimal cost, maximal security.
Projects.p2_desc: A high-performance typing test application with real-time statistics and a clean, focused UI.
Projects.p3_desc: Interactive seat selection component for logistics and transport applications, featuring smooth selection logic. Available as an NPM package.
Projects.p4_desc: Production-ready SaaS starter kit with secure authentication, Row Level Security (RLS), and real-time database subscriptions.
Projects.p5_desc: Full-featured starter kit with React 19 (Inertia.js), Spatie Roles & Permissions, and Media Library.
Projects.p6_desc: Modular production-ready backend with JWT auth, Swagger docs, and multi-database support (Dockerized).

Contact.description: Whether you have a complex backend challenge or a full-stack project idea, I'm ready to architect and build. Drop me a message and let's talk possibilities.

Footer.description: Architecting scalable systems and building high-performance digital experiences with a focus on Clean Architecture and Reliability.

Architecture.title: System Architecture & Design
Architecture.description: I don't just write code; I architect systems. From UML modeling to API orchestration, I design for modularity, scalability, and performance.
Architecture.f1_desc: Expertise in translating complex business requirements into clear Class, Sequence, and Flowchart diagrams.
Architecture.f2_desc: Designing decoupled, maintainable codebases using Clean Architecture and Layered patterns.
Architecture.f3_desc: Optimizing relational schemas, implementing indexing strategies, and architecting multi-database support.
Architecture.f4_desc: Designing scalable RESTful APIs with secure authentication flows and comprehensive documentation.
